evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Grundlagen für Data Quality & Governance schaffen
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Quality/governance foundation-building and CI/CD/DevOps practices are named alongside consulting delivery pace, giving roughly equal weight to rigour and delivery framing.
evidence.domain_risk: Grundlagen für Data Quality & Governance schaffen
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: The role affects client business decisions and KPI definitions but carries no explicit regulatory, financial-reporting, or compliance language, placing it at moderate risk.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Grundlagen für Data Quality & Governance schaffen
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The consultant is expected to help clients 'aufbauen' (build up) their data landscape from scratch on each engagement, consistent with an early-stage, foundation-building mandate.
evidence.jd_authorship: Relationale Datenquellen anbinden und stabile Datenpipelines aufbauen (z. B. Azure Data Factory)
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Responsibilities name specific tools (Azure Data Factory, Power BI, Star-Schema, Terraform) with concrete application context, showing a hiring manager wrote it.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Business-Fragen analysieren und in Data- & Analytics-Konzepte übersetzen
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Responsibilities are split evenly between translating general business questions with Fachbereiche (internal_data/BI orientation) and consulting-style stakeholder communication, with no single audience dominating.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role executes scoped client engagements (build pipelines, model data, create dashboards) rather than setting overall data strategy, so it reads as execution-oriented.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools for the candidate to use or AI systems the candidate's output would feed.
evidence.testing_framing: Erste Berührungspunkte mit CI/CD, DevOps oder Versionierung
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: CI/CD and DevOps appear as a nice-to-have familiarity item rather than an owned responsibility, so it is tool_listed.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: No compliance, audit, or risk-of-bad-data language appears anywhere in the JD.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Organisationen dabei unterstützt, ihre Datenlandschaft aufzubauen
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The core mission is helping client organisations build up their data landscape from the ground up, which is a greenfield framing.
